title: ravach #7304
definition:
1) to be wide, be spacious, breathe
    1a) (Qal) to breathe easily, be relieved
    1b) (Pual) spacious (participle)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be wide, be spacious, breathe
    1a) (Qal) to breathe easily, be relieved
    1b) (Pual) spacious (participle)

    NASB:  to be wide or spacious
